caption: A man with light-colored, styled hair, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting, speaking into a black microphone. He is wearing a white button-down shirt with a bow tie and light-colored suspenders. In the background, a wall features the text "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and a framed logo depicting a yellow shield. On-screen graphics appear in the corners of the frame, including a logo that reads "#REALTALK 101 PODCAST" and red text that says "REAL TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position and clothing, but his mouth moves as he speaks, and his facial expression shifts slightly between frames. The camera remains stationary throughout the scene, focusing on the man from the waist up as he engages in a conversation.
